programs.title: Below Deck Mediterranean
programs.desc: The stew dynamic gets further shaken up, sparking tension in the interior. Two deckhands have a heated confrontation. A deckhand's flirting widens the divide onboard.

programs.title: 24 Hours In Emergency
programs.desc: 70-year-old Jenny is rushed into the emergency department with left sided weakness and problems with her speech, whilst 81-year-old Brian has facial droop and spinal tingling.

programs.title: Judge Jerry
programs.desc: Alex says he was more than happy to lend his brother Aljahkwan some money but now Aljahkwan is refusing to pay him back!

programs.title: Keeping Up With The Kardashians
programs.desc: Kim returns to Paris for the first time since the robbery. Meanwhile Kourtney fears she waited too long to freeze her eggs.

programs.title: Botched By Nature
programs.desc: The doctors take a gamble in Sin City, helping a young woman whose autoimmune disease may have triggered her deformed breasts. S1 Ep1.

programs.title: Storage Wars
programs.desc: At Moreno Valley auctions, bids soar as Ivy and Dave battle for units. Mary dodges the fallout, Mavrick struggles to buy smart, and one buyer scores a rare find worth over $10K.
